description: As a Security Consultant for Apex Healthcare Systems, create a formal Security Assessment Report in Apache OpenOffice Writer using the raw vulnerability scan results from '/home/ga/Documents/scan_results.json'. Save the final document to '/home/ga/Documents/Apex_Security_Report_Q1_2025.odt'. The report must include a Title Page, an auto-generated Table of Contents, an 'Executive Summary', and a 'Vulnerability Summary' table with columns for ID, Vulnerability Name, and Severity. Provide a 'Detailed Findings' section with Heading 2 subsections for each of the five vulnerabilities. You must create and apply custom character styles to color-code severity text throughout the document: 'Critical' in Red, 'High' in Orange, 'Medium' in Gold/Yellow, and 'Low' in Green. Ensure the document includes the header 'CONFIDENTIAL - INTERNAL USE ONLY' and page numbers in the footer.
